title: Create KitchenSink
description: Create focused modpack with many QoL features.
body:
## Description:
A modpack focused around Create, while also bringing lots of QoL features to the game. Although it was made specifically for a private server, I decided to upload it publically for ease of access, and for anybody looking to play a relatively vanilla experience.

## Highlighted mods:
- [Applied Energistics 2](https://modrinth.com/mod/ae2/version/15.0.15) (+QoL recipes, +Wireless Terminals)
- [Create (sodium fix)](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric-sodium-fix/version/0.5.1-d-build.5+mc1.20.1) (+Steam 'n' Rails, +Crafts & Additions)
- [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-fabric/version/1.4.2) (+Expanded Delight)
- [Falling Tree](https://modrinth.com/mod/fallingtree/version/1.20.1-4.3.1)
- [Forgotten Graves](https://modrinth.com/mod/forgotten-graves/version/1.20.1-3.2.5)
- [JourneyMap](https://modrinth.com/mod/journeymap/version/1.20.1-5.9.18-fabric)
- [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat/version/fabric-1.20.1-2.4.28)
- [SleepWarp](https://modrinth.com/mod/sleep-warp/version/2.2.0-rc1+1.20.1)
- [Sound Physics Remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound-physics-remastered/version/fabric-1.20.1-1.2.1)
- [Traveler's Backpack](https://modrinth.com/mod/travelersbackpack/version/1.20.1-9.1.8)


### <u>**Credits go to all respective mod developers**</u>

### *Full list of mods visible in dependency list of all versions, expect changes with each version*
